creator: junovitch@freebsd.org
text:
Sorry Chris. I won't be able to fulfill this PR and will be returning it to the pool. The current patch has several issues:

jason@xts-bsd:/usr/ports/x11-themes/gnome-icons-blank-on % portlint -ac
WARN: Makefile: how about using "${MASTER_SITE_GNOME}" with "MASTER_SITE_SUBDIR=teams/art.gnome.org/themes/icon", instead of "https://download.gnome.org/teams/art.gnome.org/themes/icon/"?
WARN: Makefile: using hyphen in PORTNAME. consider using PKGNAMEPREFIX and/or PKGNAMESUFFIX.
WARN: Makefile: no port directory /usr/ports//usr/ports/x11-themes/gnome-icons-gorilla found, even though it is listed in RUN_DEPENDS.
0 fatal errors and 3 warnings found.
jason@xts-bsd:/usr/ports/x11-themes/gnome-icons-blank-on % make fetch
/!\ gnome-icons-blank-on-20050209: Makefile warnings, please consider fixing /!\

It looks like the
gnome-icons-gorilla>0:/usr/ports/x11-themes/gnome-icons-gorilla depends line
has an absolute port origin, make sure to remove ${PORTSDIR}/ from it.
